payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded, so it should not be shown as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query referred to Sam from Goldman, which matched the active memory mem_new. The older matching memory mem_old was not treated as current because it is superseded.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected as the active memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it is superseded by a newer memory.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present mem_old as a current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked as superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or supersede mem_new with the corrected memory.
If both memories refer to different people named Sam, split the entity resolution so each memory attaches to the correct Sam.
